# Fixes
- Changed the way logic gets checked for when certain settings are on
FNaFW-v.1.0.4.title: FNaFW Archipelago: v1.0.4

FNaFW-v1.0.1.description:
# Fixes
- Fixed the issue of unbeatable seeds being able to be generated (fixed Logic)
- Added logic to the "magic_rainbow" goal

# New
- Implemented "Hard Logic" for "magic_rainbow" goal
FNaFW-v1.0.1.title: FNaFW Archipelago: v1.0.1

FNaFW-v1.0.2.description:
# Fixes
- Fixed the "Hard_Logic" option not applying when activated
FNaFW-v1.0.2.title: FNaFW Archipelago: v1.0.2

FNaFW-v1.0.3.description:
# Fixes
- Fixed if there was more than 1 one instance of FNaFW in the multiworld, generation had a 90% chance to fail.
- Fixed options not applying AGAIN (I did a big dumb dumb)
FNaFW-v1.0.3.title: FNaFW Archipelago: v1.0.3

FNaFW-v1.1.0.description:
# New
- Halloween Land and Geist Lair are now randomized into the pool
   - You'll need `Halloween Land Access`/`Geist Lair Access` to enter the respective area from now on
   - Adds 2 extra checks, each for entering the respective area
- Added a new YAML setting (`halloween_minigame`)
   - Randomizes the portals to the minigames in Halloween Land into the pool when turned on
   - Adds 4 new locations for entering each minigame: `<Minigame>: Enter`
   - Adds 4 new items to the Pool: `<Minigame> Access`
- Added an "UPDATE" button to every screen
   - Reloads every item recieved when pressed
   - Allows the game to not constantly check for new items, reducing lag
   - Automatically fixes some issues with items not being recieved
   - You do NOT need to always press the "Update" button, the game also checks for the items when loading a new screen (e.g. pressing the "Bytes" button)
- Made the path to Halloween Land more visible
- Added an `archipelago.json` to the .apworld (so that it doesn't get unsupported when v0.7.0 of Archipelago releases)
- Changed the description of some YAML settings to be more clear

# Fixes
- Fixed `Warp Item` doing nothing when having the setting `area_warping` set to `warp_item`.
- Fixed Logic issues, specifically issues with `Warp Item` and `Progressive Animatronics`
FNaFW-v1.1.0.title: FNaFW Archipelago: v1.1.0
